nasb.text: Some of the Pharisees in the crowd said to Him, “Teacher, rebuke Your disciples.”

esv.text: And some of the Pharisees in the crowd said to him, “Teacher, rebuke your disciples.”

cnv.text: 群眾中有幾個法利賽人對他說：“先生，責備你的門徒吧！”

ccb.text: 百姓中有几个法利赛人对耶稣说：“老师，你要责备你的门徒。”

csbs.text: 人群中有一些法利赛人对耶稣说：“老师，责备你的门徒吧！”
